description: Google Analytics Admin API provides programmatic access to Google Analytics 4 account and property configuration data. It is part of Google Analytics and lets developers manage analytics administration resources such as accounts, properties, links, and settings.
summary: Google Analytics Admin exposes a REST HTTP API at analyticsadmin.googleapis.com plus a public MCP endpoint at /mcp; the REST API uses Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens or service-account-derived bearer tokens.
